programmes.show_description: The Demonic Home. Stephanie's life is turned upside down when dark energies enter her home and target her children. In Darlington, a couple claim they can summon UFOs at will. S4, Ep10
Glitch In Reality. Glitches in the matrix stun spectators in Paris, Los Angeles, and Argentina. Plus, a spirit attempts to halt construction on a family's home in the Philippines. S6, Ep1
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Cash Is King. The Baggage Battlers head to London, home to six airports, where Billy, Mark and the Martins compete for the lost and unclaimed bags of the rich passengers. S2, Ep3
California Scheming. The Baggage Battlers wage war at the crazy, eclectic Santa Cruz Lost Property Auction, where Mark brings in reinforcements to battle Billy over antique toys. S2, Ep9
Miami. The buyers are at Miami International Airport, home to 10,000 lost bags every year. Mark bids on bags of jewellery hoping to strike gold and Billy eyes up a heavy bag. S1, Ep1
London. Auction specialists fly across the Atlantic to bid on lost bags in London. Sally convinces Laurence to bid big and Mark and Billy compete to win interesting luggage. S1, Ep2
Indianapolis. The buyers are in Indianapolis to bid on bags, antiques and sports memorabilia. The Martins argue over a vintage music player and Mark spots a rare boxing collectable. S1, Ep3
Atlanta. The buyers are in Atlanta to bid on items at an unclaimed freight auction. Billy and Mark are interested in military items and the Martins discover an unusual find! S1, Ep4
New Jersey. The buyers bid on lucrative cargo at the US customs auction in New Jersey. Here, Mark takes a gamble while Billy and the Martins spot vintage bicycles. S1, Ep5
Los Angeles. Buyers bid on seized items and property at a police auction in Los Angeles. Billy and the Martins compete to win antique weapons, and Mark gambles on gold. S1, Ep6
Scotland. The buyers bid on lost property at a police auction in Glasgow, Scotland. The Martins and Billy compete to win vintage military snuff mull and Mark looks at farm tools. S1, Ep7
Florida. The buyers are in Florida at the largest airport auction in the world. Laurence and Sally and Billy compete for a unique bronze statue while Mark bids on archery equipment. S1, Ep8
The Treasure Map From Space. Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos dives the waters of Campeche, Mexico in search of shipwrecks first located by astronaut Gordon Cooper from space in 1963. S1, Ep1
Dead Silence. Darrell seeks clues from Cooper's past. His widow reveals many secrets, but a former NASA flight director won't say a word. A big piece is missing in Darrell's mission. S1, Ep2
The Columbus Connection. Darrell visits the Atocha, a valuable shipwreck Cooper recorded 50 years ago. Experts send Darrell to an archive in Spain to hunt down an ancient manifest. S1, Ep3
Dangerous Waters. Darrell finds the final piece to Cooper's code, but hiring a crew presents new danger as he discloses his secret mission. On the water, there's a big discovery. S1, Ep4
Moving Target. Following the Columbus trail, bad weather strikes and Darrell dives past the limits of his gear into extreme danger. Plus, a huge discovery changes everything. S1, Ep5
The Columbus Treasure. The discovery of a lifetime becomes a massive salvage operation. Pulling up and verifying Columbus' anchor might be the biggest challenge yet. S1, Ep6
Captain Morgan's Lost Gold. Josh dives into the Lajas Reef in search of the treasure of legendary pirate Henry Morgan. His journey takes him to a modern marvel, the Panama Canal. S1, Ep6
Blackbeard's Hidden Gold. Josh Gates explores the ocean floor of the Cayman Islands and the coasts of North Carolina to find the lost treasure of the legendary pirate, Blackbeard. S2, Ep4
Captain Kidd's Treasure. Josh travels to the Caribbean to hunt for the legendary treasure of Captain Kidd. The search takes him to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer. S3, Ep10
Lasseter's Gold. Josh Gates sets off deep into the Australian Outback. He follows the footsteps of legendary explorer Harold Lasseter, who claims to have found a vast field of gold. S3, Ep8
City Of Gold. Josh treks the Inca Trail through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of a mythical city of gold. His journey takes a detour to the ruins of Machu Picchu. S1, Ep5
500 Million Dollar List. Last season, Miklos located a shipwreck tied to Christopher Columbus using Cooper's intel. Now, Miklos has 8 weeks of cash left to find another shipwreck. S2, Ep1
Hunt For The Gold Table. After discovering a 1700s-era cannon Darrell seeks the ship's origin. A letter in Gordon's files details a 16th century wreck connected to Sir Francis Drake. S2, Ep2
Graveyard Of The Great Lakes. Treacherous Lake Superior has claimed thousands of lives. Phil and Jess dive into an investigation to uncover the alleged paranormal activity. S3, Ep5
The Ozark Howler. Jess and Phil venture deep into the Ozarks to investigate a mysterious predatory beast. New recordings of chilling howls lead to a shocking revelation. S3, Ep6
Alaskan Lake Monster. Phil and Jess search whitewater rapids and a frigid Alaskan lake for a legendary beast that's now the target of serious scientific inquiry. S3, Ep7

Teleshopping.
Grand Theft Auto. The Baggage Battlers head to the Tampa Machinery Auction to bid on 1000's of lost or seized vehicles. But will they unearth any gems amongst the lot? S2, Ep10
Eye for an Eye. The Baggage Battlers are in Toronto for one of Canada's largest freight and baggage auctions. Billy makes one of his most shocking discoveries inside his winnings. S2, Ep11
The Miner's Code Part 1. Shawn and Vernon embark on a harrowing rescue mission on a stormy Bering Sea. Meanwhile, Zeke relaunches the Havilah with a wild crew. S11, Ep15
The Miner's Code Part 2. Shawn and Vernon embark on a harrowing rescue mission on a stormy Bering Sea. Meanwhile, Zeke relaunches the Havilah with a wild crew. S11, Ep16
Nathan And Steve. The team set out to install a full-scale hard rock mining operation and deliver a potentially life changing payday for rookies, Nathan Malatesta and Steve Ogilvie. S1, Ep6
Baby Alarm. Julia and her husband John deal with a snake hiding in the doorway of a house. Plus, a family with a baby have spotted a snake in their hoover. S1, Ep9
False Pass. Time Bandit heads into False Pass to a crab offloading spot. But in the midst of storms and sand bars they're close to sinking. Can they make it through safely? S6, Ep6
When Hell Freezes Over. On the Northwestern it's Edgar's birthday, and skipper Sig is worried about his advancing age. And, most of the fleet have to battle with deadly ice. S6, Ep7
A Race Against Time. The team pushes deeper into Snake Island than ever, tempting fate with every step, and they make a discovery that will change their lives. S1, Ep6
Samurai Sword Of Power. Josh Gates travels to ancient shrines hidden across Japan in search of the mystical Honjo Masamune sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai. S1, Ep11
Curse Of The Golden Bell. Josh Gates joins local divers in the Asian country of Myanmar to search for the Great Bell of King Dhammazedi. His hunt takes him into treacherous waters. S1, Ep12
Poisoned. Soil poisoned by coal production hampers a Kentucky homestead. The Raneys must build a hillside garden on the only unpolluted land and find a source of clean water. S2, Ep2
Flood, Sweat, & Tears - Part 1. A dangerous request from the Smith family in a Missouri flood zone forces the Raneys to build a dam and plan an entire cabin move. S2, Ep3
The Bishop invests in a massive new claim, but he has no money left over for equipment. Meanwhile, the Tunnel Rats risk electrocution as they hunt for crystal opal. S5, Ep6
The Misfits search for a new claim in Andamooka's dangerous opal fields. With no working machinery, the Opal Whisperers put their hopes into a bucket of Yowah Nuts. S5, Ep7
Winter Is Coming. A massive arctic storm blasts the fleet with hurricane-force winds and monster seas. And every captain must decide how much their boats and crews can handle. S12, Ep8
Into The Gale. Winter crab season brings this year's biggest storm. Every captain must choose - risk it all and head out into the storm or stay back, tied to dock losing money. S12, Ep9
My Giant Genitals. A Kenyan man developed a growth on his genitals as a boy, but it has swollen significantly. An American man with just one arm and finger gives motivational talks. S5, Ep5
Bubble Woman. A Brazilian woman's condition causes thousands of tiny tumours that bubble her skin. Plus, a 4-year-old boy in India has an enormous foot. S5, Ep6
Jacqui and Andrew encounter a crocodile as they camp on the banks of the Palmer River. Plus, the Ferals travel to Jarman Island to mine on untouched land. S7, Ep1
